provenance.classification_note: merged PR #235 provides accepted per-node EV adoption allocation metadata for declared low/middle/high branches without choosing the final paper branch
provenance.component_output_boundary_note: The A-014 allocation artifact is accepted metadata; a loader-facing component-output manifest remains a separate IC-1 assembly boundary artifact.
provenance.packet_status: accepted executable per-node EV adoption allocation artifact; no final branch selected

provenance.classification_note: readiness report present; accepted executable IC-1 baseline artifact not present
provenance.packet_status: scaffold present; accepted executable artifact missing

provenance.boundary_note: merged PR #243 EV index is available and consumed as metadata only; no held-out data opened and no EV component arrays loaded
provenance.packet_status: accepted EV metadata index for Agent A preflight; blocked for integrated results

provenance.boundary_note: approved scaffold protocol only; no flexibility-factor values, fuzzy corners, or real flexibility result are signed here
provenance.packet_status: approved scaffold protocol; real flexibility values/results pending

provenance.classification_note: newest HP packet is a proposed executable value-binding approval template; it does not approve annual HP values or integrated HP use, and final readiness also requires D-004 paired-weather acceptance and cold-spell tolerances
provenance.packet_status: proposed executable-value-binding decision packet; approval template only

provenance.classification_note: Merged PR #241 records accepted weather source/member readiness but keeps executable PV generation blocked until D-014 capacity, A-016 scenario consistency, PV-ORIENT/PV-PARAM, node allocation, and final paired HP/PV/cold-spell gates are signed.
provenance.packet_status: proposed fail-closed executable PV readiness blockers; executable values unsigned

metadata.primary_threshold_metadata: G0-A3: strict L_import > 1.0 p.u. for four consecutive 15-minute import steps over the full year; 1.1 and 1.2 are sensitivities only
metadata.refresh_basis: origin/main through PR #243 after EV accepted-artifact index preflight merged
metadata.threshold_basis: G0-A3 resolved but not evaluated in this preflight
